generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we had real civil defense drills? Those were the days when we actually prepared for emergencies. Now, they just want us to rely on 'experts' and 'systems' that fail when it counts. We need to bring back community preparedness—it's the only way to stay safe. #CivilDefenseMatters #CommunityFirst
